arts.ttl: “Manchester United have seen what I saw” – Manager thrilled with player’s ‘imminent’ transfer to Ruben Amorim’s side
arts.sum: Manchester United are set to complete a deal with Cerro Porteño to sign Diego León. On Friday, journalist César Luis Merlo reported the Red Devils have a deal in place with Cerro Porteño. He also stated the 17-year-old will arrive at Old Trafford next summer and sign a five-year deal. arts.ttl: “My big dream” – 22-year-old wants to play for Manchester City, believes he has a ‘shortcut’ to reach Etihad
arts.sum: Filip Stevanović spent three years at Manchester City and left them for Lommel SK in the summer window. The Citizens reportedly paid around €8m to sign him from FK Partizan in 2021 and Pep Guardiola didn’t offer him minutes with the first team. arts.ttl: Relegation claim, Premier League next step, missing the point - Man City 115 charges verdict
arts.athr: newsdesk@men-news.co.uk (Simon Bajkowski, Liam Wood, Jack Flintham)
arts.sum: A hearing into the 115 charges thrown at Manchester City has taken place and an independent commission is now expected to arrive at - and then publicise - a verdict next year.
